titles.title: Find me at the feet of Jesus

properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v2 v4 v2

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Lord, here I am You have all of me Take the world You are all I need

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Find me, find me at the feet of Jesus Savior, find me with my heart bowed down Find me on my knees Find me close to Thee Find me at the feet of Jesus

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Lord, I belong to You You have my heart My only hope is You And everything You are

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: I can almost hear those angels singing, holy, holy I can almost touch the heavens in their glory, glory
